title: KB Gap
description: A knowledge base gap identified during support interactions

gap_id.description: Unique identifier for the knowledge base gap

question.description: The customer question that could not be answered

why_unanswered.description: Reason the question could not be answered from the knowledge base

suggested_answer.description: Suggested answer to add to the knowledge base

priority_for_kb_update.description: Priority for updating the knowledge base
